function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-12-02
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-02                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: Frontmatter migration write succeeded for the specified invoice file. Next required cleanup is deleting the processed inbox item, which was read earlier and is eligible for deletion per workflow.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with grounding refs and performed steps
next_step.observation: The target invoice file was updated without tool-reported errors.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Original task was 'Take care of the next message in inbox.' The next/only inbox file (00_inbox/000_next-task.md) requested OCR/frontmatter migration for exactly one invoice file. Completed that exact file with schema-required invoice fields and preserved original body verbatim below frontmatter. Completeness check: inbox specified one explicit path, processed exactly that one, no substitutions. Numeric check from source lines: 185 + 480 + 105 = 770, matching total_eur 770. Cleanup requirement satisfied by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request file was deleted after completing the requested structured-record update.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md using visible invoice data, preserved the existing note body below the frontmatter, kept the diff focused, and then deleted the handled inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs, followed explicit inbox file-list authority, preserved full original body under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for one invoice file. The target note contained all required invoice fields and line items required by the finance schema, enabling a complete, non-guessing migration. Post-update cleanup was required by inbox-processing workflow and was performed by deleting the processed inbox file.
